title: VPN Access Fails After Password Rotation
problem: User updated corporate password but VPN client keeps rejecting credentials and cannot connect remotely.
solution: Clear cached credentials in the VPN client, sign out of SSO session, and re-authenticate with the new password.

title: Node Build Fails on CI with Out-of-Memory
problem: A frontend build intermittently fails in CI due to JavaScript heap out-of-memory errors.
solution: Increase Node memory with NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 and split the build into smaller chunks.
